title: List Cluster
content:
# List Cluster

Returns a list of Cluster objects. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.

## Endpoint

`GET /orchestration/clusters/list`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.orchestration.listOrchestrationClusters()
print(response)

parameters.name: names
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the Cluster key `name`. The filter is on the full name only. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`. Can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search and filter on the list based on the Cluster keys `title` (Display Name) or `name`. The search is case insensitive and will find partial matches as well.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the Cluster key `type`. The filter is on the full name only. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`. Options are `k3s` and `kubernetes`

parameters.name: ready
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the Cluster key `ready`. Options are `true` and `false`

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the Cluster key `status`. The filter is on the full name only. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`. Options are `pending_provision`, `pending`, `online`, `unreachable` and `requires_attention`

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort the results by one of the Cluster parameters. Only one parameter can be selected. Options: `name`, `title`, `ready`, `type`, `status`, `last_seen`, `created`, `updated`, `kelvin_version`, `container_version`.
